mapper.sql: player_id, plate_appearances, at_bats, runs, doubles, triples, total_bases, walks, intentional_walks, hit_by_pitch, strikeouts, double_plays, sacrifice_hits, sacrifice_flies, slugging_pct, on_base_pct, ops, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM player_batter_stats ORDER BY player_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player_batter_stats ( player_id, plate_appearances, at_bats, runs, doubles, triples, total_bases, walks, intentional_walks, hit_by_pitch, strikeouts, double_plays, sacrifice_hits, sacrifice_flies, slugging_pct, on_base_pct, ops ) VALUES ( #{playerId}, #{plateAppearances}, #{atBats}, #{runs}, #{doubles}, #{triples}, #{totalBases}, #{walks}, #{intentionalWalks}, #{hitByPitch}, #{strikeouts}, #{doublePlays}, #{sacrificeHits}, #{sacrificeFlies}, #{sluggingPct}, #{onBasePct}, #{ops} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE plate_appearances = VALUES(plate_appearances), at_bats = VALUES(at_bats), runs = VALUES(runs), doubles = VALUES(doubles), triples = VALUES(triples), total_bases = VALUES(total_bases), walks = VALUES(walks), intentional_walks = VALUES(intentional_walks), hit_by_pitch = VALUES(hit_by_pitch), strikeouts = VALUES(strikeouts), double_plays = VALUES(double_plays), sacrifice_hits = VALUES(sacrifice_hits), sacrifice_flies = VALUES(sacrifice_flies), slugging_pct = VALUES(slugging_pct), on_base_pct = VALUES(on_base_pct), ops = VALUES(ops), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pbs.at_bats), 0) AS totalAtBats, COALESCE(SUM(p.hits), 0) AS totalHits, COALESCE(SUM(p.home_runs), 0) AS totalHomeRuns, COALESCE(SUM(pbs.doubles), 0) AS totalDoubles, COALESCE(SUM(pbs.triples), 0) AS totalTriples, COALESCE(SUM(pbs.total_bases), 0) AS totalTotalBases, COALESCE(SUM(pbs.walks), 0) AS totalWalks, COALESCE(SUM(pbs.intentional_walks), 0) AS totalIntentionalWalks, COALESCE(SUM(pbs.hit_by_pitch), 0) AS totalHitByPitch, COALESCE(SUM(pbs.strikeouts), 0) AS totalStrikeouts, COALESCE(SUM(pbs.sacrifice_flies), 0) AS totalSacrificeFlies FROM player_batter_stats pbs JOIN player p ON pbs.player_id = p.id WHERE pbs.at_bats IS NOT NULL AND pbs.at_bats > 0
